benefits.description: Significant visceral fat loss, weight reduced from 220-225 lbs to 180 lbs since June. Tesamorelin specifically targets visceral fat.
Increased thermogenesis, requiring significantly lower indoor temperatures (dropped from 80 degrees comfort to 74 degrees minimum, sleeps at 68 degrees)

side_effects.description: Significantly increased heat sensitivity and thermogenesis requiring much cooler ambient temperatures

protocol_notes: Used CJC-1295 and Ipamorelin in the morning. Tesamorelin included specifically for visceral fat targeting. Used thermogenic supplementation for monitoring. Initial BMI 35% at 220-225 pounds, 5'9", with 35-40 years of midsection fat accumulation. Weight loss stabilized at 180 lbs. High protein intake maintained.
